basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Deputy Project Manager Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 15-06-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in science/engineering/management with at least 3 years of relevant experience or Bachelor's degree with at least 5 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Master’s degree in science/engineering/management with at least 3 years of relevant experience. Bachelor's degree with at least 5 years of relevant experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Deputy Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Deputy Project Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master’s degree in science, engineering, or management with at least 3 years of relevant experience, or a Bachelor's degree with at least 5 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 23,000 to Rs. 59,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager job?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves shortlisting of eligible candidates based on their applications.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: IIT Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P.Rect./R&D/2026/113.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
